children.name:
AssertionError: Expected code - 422, but got 201
assert 422 == 201
 +  where 422 = <lookup 'status_codes'>.unprocessable
 +    where <lookup 'status_codes'> = <module 'requests.status_codes' from '/usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/requests/status_codes.py'>.codes
 +      where <module 'requests.status_codes' from '/usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/requests/status_codes.py'> = requests.status_codes
 +  and   201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
